Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8 https://boolean.wiki.uib.no/Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8 For all known APN functions over GF(2^8), the following tables list the partitions of GF(2^8) induced by the multiplicities of the Sigma sets <math>\Sigma_F^k(0)</sigma> for k = 4, as explained in the SETA paper on testing EA-equivalences . We first list the sizes of the partitions for all the previously known 8180 functions, including ones obtained by the matrix method, as given in $href="Known_instances_of_APN_functions_over_GF(2%5E8)",text="Known instances of APN functions over GF(2^8)" . The indexing in the table is the same as in $href="Known_instances_of_APN_functions_over_GF(2%5E8)",text="Known instances of APN functions over GF(2^8)" . A Magma script listing the data from the table can be downloaded here . A Magma script containing the actual partitions can be downloaded here . Tables giving the sizes of the partitions induced by the functions obtained via self-equivalence are available on a $href="Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8_2",text="separate page" due to their size. A Magma script listing the corresponding partition sizes is available here , and a script listing the actual partitions is available here . Similar data for known APN functions in dimensions other than 8 is described in $href="Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimensions_up_to_10",text="Sigma multiplicities for APN functions in dimensions up to 10" .
